payload.answer: Saved a memory card capturing the fetch failure for the provided URL.

entity_resolution.reason: Only a URL and generic fetch error details are present; no stable entity IDs were provided.

payload.intent: Extract durable memory cards from an article fetch failure event.

memory_cards.statement: Fetching the article at https://example.com/missing resulted in an HTTP 404 with a network error.

details: Captured the provided fetch failure details without asserting article contents.

repair_options: Retry fetching the same URL (in case of transient network issues).
Verify the URL path/slug or update it if the resource moved.
Use an alternate source or cached copy if available.
